content.problemStatement:
There are two people walking along a tree with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN), each of them with speed 1 edge per second.

The walk of the first person is described by a sequence of nodes u1,u2,‚Ä¶,uKu_1, u_2, \dots, u_Ku1‚Äč,u2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,uK‚Äč. This person appears in node u1u_1u1‚Äč at time 000 and walks to node u2u_2u2‚Äč using the shortest **path**; then, immediately after reaching u2u_2u2‚Äč, walks to node u3u_3u3‚Äč using the shortest path, and so on, until reaching uKu_KuK‚Äč, when this person disappears.

The walk of the second person is described by another sequence v1,v2,‚Ä¶,vLv_1, v_2, \dots, v_Lv1‚Äč,v2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,vL‚Äč in the same manner.

Count how many times these two people meet ‚ÄĒ in other words, how many times they reach the same node (including the first and last nodes of their walks) at the same time.
constraints: 1‚Č§ui‚Č§N1 \le u_i \le N1‚Č§ui‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
1‚Č§vi‚Č§N1 \le v_i \le N1‚Č§vi‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
ui‚Č†ui+1u_i \neq u_{i+1}ui‚ÄčÓÄ†=ui+1‚Äč for each valid iii
vi‚Č†vi+1v_i \neq v_{i+1}vi‚ÄčÓÄ†=vi+1‚Äč for each valid iii
the sum of NNN in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of KKK in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of LLL in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of NNN in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1035 \cdot 10^35‚čÖ103
the sum of KKK in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1035 \cdot 10^35‚čÖ103
the sum of LLL in all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1035 \cdot 10^35‚čÖ103
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and LLL.
Each of the next N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains two space-separated integers ppp and qqq describing an edge between node ppp and node qqq.
The following line contains KKK space-separated integers u1,u2,‚Ä¶,uKu_1, u_2, \dots, u_Ku1‚Äč,u2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,uK‚Äč.
The last line contains LLL space-separated integers v1,v2,‚Ä¶,vLv_1, v_2, \dots, v_Lv1‚Äč,v2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,vL‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the number of times the two people meet.
